mapper.select:
select * from ST_GATE_RNEW
and STCD = #{STCD}
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
mapper.insert: merge into ST_GATE_RNEW t using (select #{STCD} as STCD, #{TM} as TM, #{EXKEY} as EXKEY, #{EQPTP} as EQPTP from dual) s on (t.STCD = s.STCD and t.TM = s.TM and t.EXKEY = s.EXKEY and t.EQPTP = s.EQPTP) when matched then update set GTQ = #{GTQ}, GTOPNUM = #{GTOPNUM}, GTOPHGT = #{GTOPHGT}, MSQMT = #{MSQMT}, TYPE = #{TYPE} when not matched then insert (STCD,TM,EXKEY,EQPTP,EQPNO,GTQ,GTOPNUM,GTOPHGT,MSQMT,TYPE) values (#{STCD},#{TM},#{EXKEY},#{EQPTP},#{EQPNO},#{GTQ},#{GTOPNUM},#{GTOPHGT},#{MSQMT},#{TYPE})
mapper.update: merge into ST_GATE_RNEW t using ( select a.STCD,a.TM,a.EXKEY,a.EQPTP,a.EQPNO,a.GTQ,a.GTOPNUM,a.GTOPHGT,a.MSQMT,a.TYPE from ST_GATE_R a inner join ( select MAX(TM) TM,STCD,EXKEY,EQPNO,EQPTP from ST_GATE_R where STCD = #{stcd} group by STCD,EXKEY,EQPNO,EQPTP ) b on a.STCD = b.STCD and a.EXKEY = b.EXKEY and a.EQPNO = b.EQPNO and a.EQPTP = b.EQPTP and a.TM = b.TM ) s on (t.STCD = s.STCD and t.TM = s.TM and t.EXKEY = s.EXKEY and t.EQPTP = s.EQPTP) when matched then update set t.GTQ = s.GTQ, t.GTOPNUM = s.GTOPNUM, t.GTOPHGT = s.GTOPHGT, t.MSQMT = s.MSQMT, t.TYPE = s.TYPE when not matched then insert (STCD,TM,EXKEY,EQPTP,EQPNO,GTQ,GTOPNUM,GTOPHGT,MSQMT,TYPE) values (s.STCD,s.TM,s.EXKEY,s.EQPTP,s.EQPNO,s.GTQ,s.GTOPNUM,s.GTOPHGT,s.MSQMT,s.TYPE)

MERGE INTO ST_GATE_RNEW t USING ( select a.STCD,a.TM,a.EXKEY,a.EQPTP,a.EQPNO,a.GTQ,a.GTOPNUM,a.GTOPHGT,a.MSQMT,a.TYPE from ST_GATE_R a inner join ( select MAX(TM) TM,STCD,EXKEY,EQPNO,EQPTP from ST_GATE_R group by STCD,EXKEY,EQPNO,EQPTP ) b on a.STCD = b.STCD and a.EXKEY = b.EXKEY and a.EQPNO = b.EQPNO and a.EQPTP = b.EQPTP and a.TM = b.TM ) s ON (t.STCD = s.STCD and t.EXKEY = s.EXKEY and t.EQPTP = s.EQPTP) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.TM = s.TM, t.EQPNO = s.EQPNO, t.GTQ = s.GTQ, t.GTOPNUM = s.GTOPNUM, t.GTOPHGT = s.GTOPHGT, t.MSQMT = s.MSQMT, t.TYPE = s.TYPE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (STCD, TM, EXKEY, EQPTP, EQPNO, GTQ, GTOPNUM, GTOPHGT, MSQMT, TYPE) VALUES (s.STCD, s.TM, s.EXKEY, s.EQPTP, s.EQPNO, s.GTQ, s.GTOPNUM, s.GTOPHGT, s.MSQMT, s.TYPE);
